article.title: Noizekid: Mexican Moombahton and Dancehall Producer
article.subtitle: Collaborations with DJ Snake, Bad Bunny, and Major Lazer define his trajectory.
article.author: D. Varela
article.excerpt: Noizekid is a Mexican moombahton and dancehall producer known for his work with prominent industry figures. His sample pack release further solidifies his production approach.

content.text: Noizekid is a Mexican moombahton and dancehall producer recognized for his collaborations with notable figures in the music industry, including DJ Snake, Bad Bunny, and Major Lazer.
His production style is characterized by a fusion of moombahton and dancehall elements, resulting in a distinctive sound that has garnered attention within electronic music circles.

In addition to his production work, Noizekid released the 'Noizekid Sample Pack' in collaboration with Barnation. This pack includes a comprehensive collection of his samples, loops, and drum sounds, offering insight into his creative process.

His work is further contextualized by associations with similar artists such as ETC!ETC!, Los Dutis, LOOJAN, Bsno, and Freebot, all of whom contribute to the evolving landscape of Latin electronic music.
